test(e2e): expand test coverage to 94 cases

ci-webhook.spec.ts (27 → 40):
- Owner token authorization
- Running → failure transition

- Nonexistent workflow returns 404
- SSR without JavaScript: commits, branches, actions pages

commits-branches.spec.ts (11 → 18):
- Root commit has no parent link
- Commit without diffs shows no changed files heading
- SSR structure validation for commit detail and list
- Branch SSR markup validation
- Non-current branches lack * prefix
- Branch count matches seed data

commit.message:
feat: add token-based permission control for write API endpoints

- Role model: Owner (admin), Write (CI operations), Read (view only)
- Bearer token authentication on POST /api/webhook/relay and
  POST /api/actions/runs/status
- Read endpoints (GET pages) remain publicly accessible
- Seed tokens: owner (tok-owner-001), write (tok-write-001),
  read (tok-read-001)
- 6 new E2E tests for permission enforcement:
  - No token → 401
  - Invalid token → 401
  - Read-only token → 403
  - Read endpoints accessible without token

fix: completely eliminate theme flash on page load

- html starts with visibility:hidden
- Blocking inline script in <head> reads localStorage, sets ALL CSS
  custom properties, then sets visibility:visible
- If no saved theme, applies paper defaults then shows page
- Main container uses var(--theme-bg) instead of React state inline
  style, so it inherits the script-set values immediately
- Zero flash regardless of saved theme

feat: implement TupleSections extension with gap-based lambda desugaring (1867 tests)

`(,1) 42` → `(42,1)`, `(1,) 99` → `(1,99)`, `map (,True) [1,2,3]` → list of
pairs. Parser detects leading/consecutive commas as gaps; lowerer generates
`\$ts_N -> (elements...)` lambdas. Also fixes derive_enum test assertion for
succ/pred method count (2→4).

commit.message:
fix(tekton-ci): use comma separator in changedFilesPredicate (0.3.10)

Tekton's addChangedFiles interceptor produces a comma-separated
changed_files string, not space-separated. (^| ) never matched paths
after the first entry. Changed to (^|,) which matches at start of
string or after a comma.

Verified from live interceptor logs:
  changed_files: backend/...,vite-app/src/GoalCreationForm.tsx,...

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 修復白屏 — matchVendorName 被 JS 註解吃掉

根本原因：sed 插入時所有行合併成一行，開頭的 // 註解
把整個 useCallback 定義都變成註解，導致 matchVendorName
未定義，頁面載入時 ReferenceError → 白屏

修復：將 // 註解和 const 宣告拆成兩行，移除函數內的
行內註解避免單行化後出問題

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add rate limiting, token refresh, and error sanitization

- Add in-memory sliding-window rate limiter (src/lib/rate-limit.ts)
- Rate limit auth endpoints: 10 attempts per 15 min per IP
- Rate limit analyze endpoints: 20 requests per hour per userId
- Rate limit checkout: 5 requests per 10 min per userId
- All 429 responses include Retry-After header
- Square token cache now expires after 30 min and re-fetches from Secrets Manager
- Sanitize verify route error messages (no Cognito internals leaked)
- Periodic cleanup of stale rate limit entries (every 5 min)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 待入帳清單的車號/日期/廠商/里程均可點擊修正

問題：OCR 辨識車號錯誤（如 BYV-3830→BYV-2830），使用者在
AI 對話中糾正但對話無法修改 ocrPendingList，確認入帳後
仍以錯誤車號存入

修復：待入帳清單的表頭欄位全部改為可點擊編輯：
- 🚛 車號：點擊彈出 prompt，輸入正確車號後自動正規化
- 📅 日期：點擊修正日期
- 🏭 廠商：點擊修正廠商名稱
- 🛣️ 里程：點擊修正里程數
每個欄位右側顯示 ✏️ 圖示提示可編輯

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: add CI setup phase to new-project.sh #36

Before creating the project directory, the script now:
1. Creates a setup-ci branch and updates test.yml path filters
2. Opens and merges a PR to main via gh
3. Checks out main, then creates the project branch

feat: implement DerivingVia extension + archive AGENTS.md (1851 tests)

DerivingVia: `newtype Age = MkAge Int deriving (Show) via Int` generates
instances that unwrap the newtype and delegate to the via type's methods.
Supports Show, Eq, Ord, Num. Parser extended to consume `via Type` in
deriving clauses, lowerer extracts deriving_via entries, derive_via_chirho
generates concrete method bodies. 4 new e2e tests.

Also archived Phase 2 details and Phase 3 completed items to spec-chirho/,
condensed AGENTS.md from ~124 to ~70 lines.

commit.message:
Security hardening: webhook idempotency, auth enforcement, error sanitization

- Enforce webhook signature verification (fail hard, never skip)
- Add webhook idempotency via DynamoDB event tracking (30-day TTL)
- Validate webhook metadata (scan count, pack ID)
- Require auth on /api/analyze and /api/analyze-stream endpoints
- Fix open redirect on login page (validate relative paths only)
- Add security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CSP, etc.)
- Sanitize Cognito error messages in signup (no internal leaks)
- Validate checkout redirect origin against allowlist
- Move Square IDs to env vars
- Remove dev error detail leaks from analyze and generate-tests
- Rename useScanCredit → deductScanCredit (fix ESLint false positives)
- Add error.tsx boundary and not-found.tsx 404 page
- Strengthen login password validation (min 8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(viewer): escape template literal in split resizer script

The `${current}px` inside the inline JS script was being interpolated
by the MoonBit compiler's outer template literal, causing a
ReferenceError in bench/test contexts where no `current` variable
existed in scope. Switch to string concatenation to avoid this.

commit.message:
Fix schedule date validation comparing day-level not datetime

The user submits a date (2026-03-16) which parses as midnight,
but valid_start_date is max(starts_at, now()) which has a time
component. Comparing midnight < 10:49 always fails on the same
day. Now both sides use startOfDay() for date-level comparison.

  and Netlify form fetch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: sub workers missing from all site previews (subs=0)

Two root causes fixed:
1. When sub name fuzzy match fails but matched_eid succeeds,
   resolved_name stayed as OCR name (abbreviated). Now looks up
   the full DB name from subcontractor_employees so the S_ dedup
   key matches the cross-site filter's allowed names list.

2. Sub cross-site filter used exact normalized name match only.
   OCR abbreviates names (e.g. "ABDULHAKIM ABDELA" vs full DB name
   "ABDULHAKIM ABDELA ABDULKERIM"). Added fuzzy fallback using
   _names_match() for S_ keys that fail exact match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: strict name matching in cross-site filter to prevent false positives

Root cause: _names_match() matches on a SINGLE shared 4+ char word.
Common surnames like YADAV, KUMAR, SINGH cause false positives - e.g.
"SUNIL YADAV" (Expo Valley) matched "AJAY YADAV" (Factory), so SUNIL
incorrectly appeared in Factory's preview with 10 present days.

Fix: require 2+ matching words when both names have 2+ significant
words. Single-word names still use normal matching.

Also removes temporary debug trace logging.
